nasb.text: Only on this condition will we consent to you: if you will become like us, in that every male of you be circumcised,

esv.text: Only on this condition will we agree with you—that you will become as we are by every male among you being circumcised.

cnv.text: 只有一個條件，我們才可以答允你們，就是你們當中所有的男子都受割禮，像我們一樣。

ccb.text: 除非你们所有的男子都跟我们一样受割礼，

csbs.text: 只有在一个条件下，我们才答应你们，就是你们当中所有的男子都要像我们一样受割礼。
